missing_requirements.description: It is unclear if the NLP requirements are intended as a new feature for the existing 'User Journey Task Manager' (e.g., automated task categorization) or if they describe a new 'NLP Learning Platform' application.
The requirements describe educational content but do not define who the user is (student, professional, or an end-user of an NLP-powered tool).
The document is a curriculum/study guide. Specific functional requirements (e.g., 'The system shall provide a search interface for NLP tokens') are not defined.
If this is a feature for the Task Manager, how it integrates with the existing 'Task' model and 'Home' dashboard is not specified.
